# Documentation Update

## Documentation Area

Which area needs to be updated?

- [ ] Main README
- [ ] Range Setup Instructions
- [ ] Target Environment
- [ ] Red Team Environment
- [ ] SOC / Detection Environment
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Scenarios
- [ ] References
- [ ] Diagrams
- [ ] Other

## Current Issue

Describe what is unclear, missing, outdated, or incorrect.

## Suggested Change

Explain what should be added, removed, or changed.

## Why This Matters

Explain how this improvement helps future students, contributors, or people trying to recreate the cyber range.

## Screenshots or Links

Add screenshots, links, or file paths if helpful.

## Additional Notes

Add any extra context here.
